description: Product Description Premium quality soft boa plush dog with realistic features, soft fur and airbrushed details. yomiko classics are a world famous brand offering a broad collection of realistically styled animals, many of which are uniquely enhanced with air brushed features.approximately 5 inches (12.7 cm) high. suitable for all ages. hand wash and air dry. other sizes and friends also available in the yomiko classics range of sitting and lying cats, dogs and jungle animals. please remove all tags before giving this to a child. suki gifts are an innovative british company, providing high quality gifts and soft toys including baby, teddy bears, plush toys, mugs, piggy banks and much more.
